summary: Both REQ-8 and REQ-9 appear to be implemented in the diff. NewsSection.tsx shows the heading changed to 'TODAY NEWS' with decorative label 'Today Updates', and the frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms LandingPage.tsx assembles sections in Hero → About → Roster → News → Footer order. All constraints (preserved 'Meet With LEGEND' heading, preserved CTA button text 'Join Now'/'For Tournament', no hooks/ui modifications) appear respected.
